cues.text: 晚上一起去看球賽嗎？
cues.tr: Do you want to go to the ball game tonight?

cues.text: 當然要去啊！聽說這場比賽超級精彩。
cues.tr: Of course we will! I've heard that it's a great game.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 是吧，我也聽說了。你覺得我們的球隊能贏嗎？
cues.tr: Yeah, I've heard that too. Do you think our team can win?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 最近他們表現不錯，我還挺滿意的，但還是有點緊張。
cues.tr: They've been playing well lately, so I'm happy with them, but I'm still a little nervous.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 這場比賽很重要，大家都在聊呢。
cues.tr: It's a big game, everyone's talking about it.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 沒錯，所以我還有點害怕他們會不會輸啊。
cues.tr: That's right, so I'm still a little bit scared that they'll lose.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 別擔心！他們上次比賽打得很好，又拿下一場勝利。
cues.tr: Don't worry! They played a good game last time and got another win.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 真的希望這次能再贏一次，那我就放心了。
cues.tr: I really hope they can win again this time, that would be a relief.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 是啊，要是再贏一次，我們肯定嗨翻天！
cues.tr: Yes, if they win again, we'll have a great time!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 不過，要是他們真輸了，我們該怎麼辦？
cues.tr: But what if they do lose?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 也沒什麼大不了的，反正他們這段時間變化挺大的。
cues.tr: No big deal. They've changed a lot in a while.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對，我也注意到了，他們進步明顯啊。這次應該能有更好的表現。
cues.tr: Yeah, I've noticed that they've improved a lot. They should be able to do better this time.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你覺得這場比賽會很安靜，還是會特別刺激？
cues.tr: Do you think the game will be quiet or exciting?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 應該會超級刺激吧，因為大家都在期待啊！
cues.tr: I think it's going to be super exciting because everyone is looking forward to it!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也覺得肯定很刺激。你知道座位在哪兒嗎？
cues.tr: I think it's going to be exciting too. Do you know where the seats are?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還不知道，我們馬上看看票吧！
cues.tr: No, let's check the tickets right away!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好呀！如果我們的位置靠近場地，那就太棒了。
cues.tr: Okay! It would be great if we were near the venue.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對啊，希望我們能看到球員的表情！
cues.tr: Yeah, I hope we can see the players' faces!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那我們趕快走吧，晚了人多了就擠不進去了。
cues.tr: Let's go quickly, if we're late, we won't be able to squeeze in.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 沒錯，現在走最好，這樣可以找個安靜點的地方坐下。
cues.tr: Yes, it's best to leave now so we can find a quieter place to sit.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 走吧走吧，希望今晚的比賽能讓我們滿意！
cues.tr: Let's go, let's go, I hope we can be satisfied with the game tonight!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我也是，今晚肯定精彩，等不及了！
cues.tr: Me too, it's going to be a great night, can't wait!
cues.speaker: B
